message:
refactor: apply idiomatic Rust patterns and add decision-plane E2E test suite

- Replace manual Default impls with derive Default (FetchOptions, BootstrapOptions)
- Use is_some_and() and is_none_or() for cleaner option handling (Rust 1.70+/1.82+)
- Replace push_str(&format!()) with writeln! for safer string formatting
- Add # Errors doc comments to fallible public functions
- Add #[must_use] attributes to fetch_assets and run_bootstrap
- Make simple constructors and predicates const fn in daemon/notifications
- Add 6 comprehensive E2E decision-plane scenarios (bd-izu.7):
  shadow mode baseline, canary promotion, calibration drift detection,
  fallback activation, fault injection resilience, and recovery validation
- Add seeded RNG test infrastructure for reproducible fixtures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
